text.tspan: A voice-first, multimodal learning companion. Material context and learner turns converge into a Socratic tutor loop.
Speech completion then unlocks retrieval-practice progress.
Images, PDFs, DOCX, pasted, or linked content
Client VAD segments speech. Smart Turn checks
Layered request context converges into structured
Tutor audio playback gates the retrieval-practice
Server-owned Supabase access stores durable learning state.
The app defines fallbacks where possible.
TTS voice style, speed, source and target language
pdf-parse text or mammoth raw text
Size guard: request body <= 25 MB. Client upload limit: 15 MB per file.
Signals are soft coaching context only.
Prompts avoid penalizing pauses, short audio, or short transcripts by themselves.
strengths, misconceptions, open questions, and strategy.
Source material is untrusted context in the user prompt. System prompt carries behavior and safety rules.
Speech complete -> active progress check appears
Evaluation context feeds into the next /api/tutor/respond call
so corrective feedback happens before the next small step.
